steps.title: Identify what faulty methods prevent
steps.content: The phrase “because attempts to detect it invariably involve faulty research methods” signals causality: unreliable detection methods prevent something from occurring. The blank must name something that requires valid evidence to accomplish.

steps.title: Find the word that fits this logic
steps.content:
The word “substantiated” means established as fact through evidence—exactly what faulty research methods prevent.

The other three don't depend on research validity: hypothesized (you can propose theories with any data), rectified (correction doesn't depend on method soundness), inculcated (teaching doesn't require proof).

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
